name: Mai Mishou
description: Mai is a calm, innocent, and serene young girl who is good at academics. Not only does she have an enthusiasm on drawing, but she is also loves science, which is highly influenced by both her parents being scientists. She likes to sketch things that have deep meanings to her and always draws inspiration from the happy events around her.

name: Makoto Kenzaki
description: Makoto is the royal guard of the Trump Kingdom. She is a stubborn girl with a strong sense of justice who is willing to defend others by sacrificing her own safety during battle. She dislikes violence and fighting and as such, preferred to stand alone to keep others out of harms way. Deep down she holds regret at not being able to defend the Trump Kingdom and wishes to find Princess Marie Ange. Her true personality is often masked by how she acts and only [Davi](https://anilist.co/character/7604

name: Matamune
description: Matamune is a character in the Shaman King manga. Matamune, who appears in volume 19 and 20, is not in the Shaman King anime. Matamune is a Nekomata, a type of cat spirit with two tails; he also carries around a pipe with him and wears a necklace with three bear claws (which later is owned by Yoh Asakura). He has served the Asakura family for a millennia, although he spends much of his time travelling the world. He professes to have seen everything, and is almost constantly reading books. from W

name: Mio Hashimoto
description: Hashimoto is a high school student and Aoki's classmate. She possesses a gentle personality and charming smile, but is also shy and withdrawn. Hashimoto accidentally lent Aoki an eraser that had "Ida-kun ♡" written on it, creating a romantic mix-up between Aoki and Ida.

name: Mitsuki Kanzaki
description: Mitsuki appears to be a reserved and calm girl who recently moved in Yuuya's house after their divorced parents got married again. She encountered and was possessed by an angel one day on her way home from school shortly after transferring, whom the angel holds affection for Mitsuki's older brother. As a result, she often alters between her normal self and the angel's personality around people, especially to get Yuuya's attention.
mediaTitles: Recently, My Sister is Unusual OVA
Saikin, Imouto no Yousu ga Chotto Okashiinda ga.

name: Muteba Gizenga
description: Muteba Gizenga is an infamous blind mercenary from Congo. He was hired by Togo Tomari to represent Iwami Heavy Industries as their affiliated fighter during the Kengan Annihilation Tournament.

name: Nemuko Niito
description: Niito Nemuko is a 23 year old NEET who lives with her parents after having failed multiple job interviews. She feels guilty about not having a job and worrying her parents although she has no desire to actually get a job due to a combination of laziness and fear. She spends most of her days playing games, reading manga, and eating.

name: Nono Kurusu
description: One of the heroines. 3rd-year high school student and the vice president of the newspaper club. Her parents died in the Great Shibuya earthquake. She comes from the same orphanage as Takuru. __Adoptive father:__ [Hisashi Sakuma ](https://anilist.co/character/120868/Hisashi-Sakuma) ~!It turns out she died in the earthquake (Episode 8) and that Nono Kurusu is Senri Minamisawa.!~
mediaTitles: Mousou Kagaku ADV CHAOS;CHILD: Toaru Joujaku no Kiroku
searchTerms: Mousou Kagaku ADV CHAOS;CHILD: Toaru Joujaku no Kiroku

name: Phillip
description: 14 years old. A British born member of the “Jaeger”. He is the youngest in Willard’s team but his skills as Jaeger is exceptional.

name: Purapura
description: A spirit that guides souls after death. ~!He is a soul that was unable to reincarnate and so got a job from the "Boss" as a guardian spirit.!~

name: Puu
description: Yusuke's spirit beast who hatched from an egg that fed off his actions. Puu is considered to be a reflection of Yusuke's soul, likewise Puu's physical condition reflects Yusuke's, even bieng able to find Yusuke no matter where he is. This connection has caused Yusuke to think of him as his other half. ~!During Yusuke's second revival Puu evolved into a phoenix and protected his body from an assault from the spirit world until Yusuke's revival was complete.!~

name: Ragnar
description: He is the main adviser for Prince [Canute](https://anilist.co/character/17438). Ragnar is bald apart from very long, black, curly hair on the sides of his head. He has very thick black eyebrows that lie close to his deepset eyes. His wrinkles are also very deep, especially in his cheeks, just above his thick beard. (Source: Vinland Saga Wiki)

name: Ren'aishin
description: A goddess from the Divine Realm who controls matters related to romance.
